slides.title: Business overview

perimeter.label: Transaction perimeter
perimeter.subLabel: Entities under FDD scope of work

overviewBody: [GROUP FULL NAME] operates a coffee shop platform under the [BRAND 1] name and adjacent bakery and catering services.
[ENTITY 1]: Manufactures coffee beans and is the non-exclusive dealer of coffee beverages and machines.
[ENTITY 2]: Operates [BRAND 1] coffee shops with nationwide coverage and supports owned, franchised, and co-invested stores.
[ENTITY 3]: Produces bakery products and provides one-stop support for bakery product development.
[ENTITY 1], [ENTITY 2], and [ENTITY 3] are held by [GROUP NAME] and related family shareholders.
Shareholder detail and legal ownership considerations are included in Appendix 1.
slides.source: Source: Presentation of [BRAND 1] business and management interviews.
